problems.diagnostic: Assignment statements are allowed only in component implementations
problems.cause: AGREE assignment statements are only valid in implementation annexes
problems.minimal_edit: Move the assignment statements to the implementation annex

problems.cause: Subcomponent ports are not visible in component type annexes
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the assignment statement or move it to the implementation annex

problems.diagnostic: LHS of assignment must be an AGREE 'eq' variable or an output port of this component
problems.cause: Subcomponent ports are not valid assignment targets in component type annexes
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the assignment statement or move it to the implementation annex

executor_steps: Move the assignment statements to the implementation annex
Ensure the implementation annex is properly formatted and valid
